import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let len = string.len(input)
  if len == 0
    print("lines=0")
  else
    mut count = 0
    mut i = 0
    while i < len
      let b = string.byte_at(input, i)
      match b
      when Some(10)
        count = count + 1
      when _
        count = count
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    let last_byte = string.byte_at(input, len - 1)
    match last_byte
    when Some(10)
      count = count
    when _
      count = count + 1
    end
    print("lines=#{count}")
  end
end
